rationale: Clean, well-structured implementation. `FanOutClient.Execute` correctly fans out in parallel, enforces a semaphore-based concurrency cap and a per-node `context.WithTimeout`, returns partial results with separate maps for responses, errors, skipped, and status updates. Outcome taxonomy (OK/Offline/Timeout/HTTPError/Skipped) cleanly distinguishes transport failure (→ StatusOffline) from per-node timeout (no status flip, preserves stale) and HTTP errors (transport worked, no flip). Tests cover all chaos scenarios specified: dead spoke, slow spoke, mid-response disconnect, version-incompat, capability gap, plus payload/error-handling smoke tests.
